Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sepldeh Hersel, Esq. (310.550.1006) of Hersel Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Michael Brisbin, Esq. (415.625.9260; michael.brisbin@wilsonelser.com) of Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not in compliance with tentative ruling rule.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LPF 12TH STREET GARAGE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Written Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff Jose Mendez:

No timely opposition filed; motion granted. Responses to be served without objections by October 12, 2021.

The court will review proposed order submitted by counsel for defendant.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Written Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff Jose Mendez
Off Calendar Sep-10-2021 Continued To Sep-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS LPF 12TH STREET GARAGE, INC's Motion To Compel Written Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff Jose Mendez.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
Matter is continued on the court's own motion to September 27, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. Recusal by Judge Pro Tem Katherine Gallo.

Per the instructions posted on the department's website (https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/civil/law-motion), parties must attach electronic copies of discovery motion papers to an email addressed to Discovery302@sftc.org. The subject line of the email should state the case name and number and the continued hearing date.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
